nasb.text: The eye of the adulterer waits for the twilight, Saying, ‘No eye will see me.’ And he disguises his face.

esv.text: The eye of the adulterer also waits for the twilight, saying, ‘No eye will see me’; and he veils his face.

cnv.text: 姦夫的眼睛等待黃昏， 說：‘沒有眼可以看見我’， 就把自己的臉蒙起來。

ccb.text: 奸夫的眼睛盼着黄昏， 心想，‘没人会看见我’， 并把脸蒙起来。
